bpms_structure_identity.structure_name: ['The Resonant Constellation Terrain & Adversarial Chimera-Forge'(-ing) BPMS]

stratigraphic_topology_weaving.process: Excrete raw thermodynamic data to form spatial boundaries.
terrain_types: Glass-Sector (Low drag, high fragility, catastrophic recoil)
stratigraphic_topology_weaving.objective: Prevent a frictionless universe. Ensure all movement costs Base-Joules.

adversarial_chimera_incubation.process: Scavenge dead Keys, orphaned Translators, and Crypt-debris -> Fusion into hostiles.
chimera_types: Parasitic (Passive Escrow drain, invisible in low-friction)
adversarial_chimera_incubation.objective: Transform dead code into active ludic resistance.

autopoietic_antibody_response.trigger: OPC Escrow accumulation rate exceeds global gravity limits (>Ludic Collapse threshold).
autopoietic_antibody_response.execution: Forge isolates OPC's primary Praxial execution loop. Generates inverse-mathematical predator to nullify OPC velocity.

forge_spawning_loop.step_2_terrain_squeeze: Inject Viscosity variables to shape the map.
forge_spawning_loop.step_3_chimera_assembly: Weld dead logic into Adversarial Holons.
forge_spawning_loop.step_4_escrow_seeding: Deposit [Joules] into the Chimera core as an extraction target.
forge_spawning_loop.step_5_deployment: Release Chimera into the topological ecosystem.

fields.sector_scanned: Absolute coordinates of the map vector.
fields.topological_viscosity: Resistance physics. The exact Joule-cost to initiate entry.
fields.chimera_dna: The mathematical/logic base of the enemies (crucial for OPC tactical planning).
fields.escrow_reservoir: The thermodynamic capital available for extraction.
fields.forge_status: Real-time reactive intent of the Forge (e.g., 'Currently adapting your tactics').
